reasoning: Order #000000563 is marked Complete with item shipped and fully paid. The customer claims the package shows delivered but was not received. There is no visible delivery confirmation, signature, or tracking detail on the order view to validate delivery or misdelivery. Per policy and to avoid improper refunds, this requires carrier investigation (check shipment tracking, delivery scan, and address verification) before issuing a credit memo. Escalating to logistics/support for delivery confirmation is appropriate.

trajectory.thought: Need to review specific order #000000563 to check status, delivery, and tracking before deciding on refund.
